distilleries.name: Porto Augusto's
distilleries.address: Rua de França 8-10, 4400-174 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
distilleries.description: A small family Port house off the tourist strip in Gaia, producing aged Tawnies fortified with grape-spirit aguardente. The intimate lodge tour explains Port fortification one-on-one.
distilleries.distillation_method: Fortified-wine lodge: Douro wines arrested mid-fermentation with grape-spirit aguardente, then cask-aged in Gaia
distilleries.tasting_program: Personal lodge tour with a guided Port tasting from around EUR 5, refunded against a purchase

verified.address_quoted: R. de França, 8-10, Vila Nova de Gaia

distilleries.name: Cockburn's Port Lodge
distilleries.address: Rua Serpa Pinto 346, 4400-307 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
distilleries.description: Gaia's largest wooden Port cellar and a working lodge, holding one of the greatest collections of oak vats. Tours explain how Douro wine is fortified with aguardente and cask-aged.
distilleries.distillation_method: Fortified-wine lodge: Douro wine arrested with grape-spirit aguardente, matured in a vast wooden-vat cellar
distilleries.tasting_program: Guided lodge tour with Port tastings; cheese and chocolate pairing options

verified.address_quoted: Rua Serpa Pinto, 346, 4400-307 Vila Nova de Gaia

distilleries.name: Burmester Cellars
distilleries.address: Largo Dom Luís I, 4400-111 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
distilleries.description: A historic Port house beside the Luis I bridge, celebrated for aged Colheita Tawnies. Cellar tours walk through how Douro wine is fortified and matured in cask.
distilleries.distillation_method: Fortified-wine lodge: Douro wine fortified with grape-spirit aguardente, then long cask ageing for Colheita Tawnies
distilleries.tasting_program: Guided cellar tour with Port tasting; chocolate and cheese pairing flights available

verified.address_quoted: Largo Ponte Luiz I 4400-111 Vila Nova de Gaia

distilleries.name: Porto Gin Experience (Invicta Gin School)
distilleries.address: Rua Mouzinho da Silveira 352, 4050-418 Porto, Portugal
distilleries.description: A hands-on gin distilling experience near São Bento where guests learn the botanicals and copper-still process and distil their own small bottle of gin to take home.
distilleries.distillation_method: Copper pot-still distillation of neutral grain spirit with juniper and botanicals; guest-led mini distillation
distilleries.tasting_program: Guided gin workshop with self-made gin and tastings; booking required
